division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: The department, upon renewing a registration, shall issue a new registration card to the owner as upon an original registration.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 5. Renewal of Registration [4600 - 4610]
##### § 4607

The department, upon renewing a registration, shall issue a new registration card to the owner as upon an original registration.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The department, upon renewing a registration, shall issue a new registration card to the owner as upon an original registration.
